notes: Power Mode menu (MENU > GUC MODU): NORMAL (default, AMOLED 70%, screen blanks to alive indicator after timeout in RIDING) or PERFORMANCE (full bright, always on). User-picked screen timeout: 15s / 30s / 1m / 2m (default 30s). IDLE fully blanks after timeout, touch wakes. Hard lean (>=20°) brings HUD back during dimmed RIDING, releases below 18° dims again. Battery warnings while dimmed: <=30% one-shot orange BATT% for 3s, <=20% red flash every 60s, <=5% full-screen red CHARGE NOW takeover. AXP2101 healthy cutoff raised to 3100 mV to protect the cell from damage-zone discharge.
